cards.name: Tom Bombadil
cards.quote: In the greenwood, laughter is a shield more sure than iron.
cards.actionEffect: Clear Fear <sprite name="fear"> from all controlled characters.

cards.name: Fatty Bolger
cards.quote: The quiet gate is often the first to know of danger.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 15 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Old Forest
cards.quote: The Old Forest is older than the road, and not all old things are kindly.

cards.name: Stock
cards.quote: Stock keeps watch upon the Buckland road, where a lamp in the window still means comfort against the dark.

cards.name: Crickhollow
cards.quote: Crickhollow lies quiet under hedge and hill, a hidden door for those who must travel unseen.

cards.name: TreeParty
cards.quote: There was laughter in the green, and the dark could not abide it.
cards.actionEffect: Hobbits, humans, and dwarves in radius 5 gain Encouraged<sprite name="encouraged"> for 1 turn, and troll units are Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: BagginsDontLeaveHere
cards.quote: A small foot may slip where a dark thought would stumble.
cards.actionEffect: Hobbits within a personal radius of 2-4 hexes gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> for 1 turn and lose Fear <sprite name="fear">.

cards.name: GoingOnAnAdventure
cards.quote: A road once named calls the stout-hearted forth.
cards.actionEffect: Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 gain Encouraged<sprite name="encouraged">.

cards.name: MathomHouse
cards.quote: What was put by in peace may yet be found useful in need.
cards.actionEffect: From the old mathoms, you gain 1<sprite name="iron"> 1<sprite name="steel"> 1<sprite name="mithril">.

cards.name: Riddle
cards.quote: A true word may yet turn the sword-arm aside, and set the boldest heart to doubt.
cards.actionEffect: Choose one character. Their refusal of duels ends, and you will win any duel forced on you this turn.

cards.name: UnexpectedFireworks
cards.quote: Bright sparks may unmask the wary and send the timid running.
cards.actionEffect: All Hobbits in radius 2 gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> for 1 turn, and all hexes in radius 3 are seen for 1 turn.

cards.name: Shirriffs and Bounders
cards.quote: A quiet watch keeps the lanes from forgetting themselves.
cards.actionEffect: All hexes of the Shire are seen for 1 turn.

cards.name: Muddy Lane
cards.quote: Even the mud may exact its due, till the purse and store are both made lighter.
cards.actionEffect: The strongest enemy in your hex loses a total of 10 value in random resources, or gold if that is all they have, using caravan prices.

cards.name: LanternsAtBreeGate
cards.quote: Lantern-light leaves little room for shadow.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal all hexes in radius 3 as seen for 1 turn.

cards.name: OldForestTurnabout
cards.quote: The old ways know how to turn a path against the walker.
cards.actionEffect: If played in a forest, allied units in this hex gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and Haste <sprite name="haste"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: RoomAtTheLastInn
cards.quote: A warm room mends what the road has frayed.
cards.actionEffect: Heal all characters in your current hex by 15.

cards.name: Road to Rivendell
cards.quote: There are roads that remember the brave.
cards.actionEffect: The road west is ever kind to the small and the stubborn. Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> and Haste <sprite name="haste">; Fear <sprite name="fear"> and Halted <sprite name="halted"> are cleared.

cards.name: The Prancing Pony
cards.quote: A welcoming inn can gather the far-wandered home.
cards.actionEffect: Move up to 2 Hobbit, Dunedain, or Dwarf allies from adjacent hexes into your hex, and heal them 10.

cards.name: The Greenway
cards.quote: Along the old road, quick feet and faithful hearts may yet outpace the shadow.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Hobbit, Dunedain, and Dwarf units in radius 2 gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> for 2 turns.

cards.name: Bree Rumours
cards.quote: Five blind places are named by whisper, and the map remembers them.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal 5 random unrevealed hexes as unseen.

cards.name: The Sack of Bag End
cards.quote: When the halls stood empty, hungry hands came softly in the dusk.
cards.actionEffect: Steal one transferable artifact from a random enemy character in your hex, if any are present.

cards.name: Watch at Crickhollow
cards.quote: While the doors are barred, the little folk may sleep; Fatty keeps the watch in the dark.
cards.actionEffect: Allied units in the hex reset their movement spent to 0 and gain Refusing Duelds <sprite name="refusingduels"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Bombadil's Whim
cards.quote: When the merry fellow laughs, trouble may find itself elsewhere.
cards.actionEffect: None can predict what the Old Man will do next. Reveal Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> enemies in radius 2; the strongest is displaced 5 hexes from any PC or allied unit.

cards.name: Elven Lull
cards.quote: Soft song and bright lament can still the dark and quicken the hidden road.
cards.actionEffect: A hush falls as starlight settles on the wood. Allied Hobbits and Elves in radius 2 gain Haste <sprite name="haste">; Nazgul gain Blocked <sprite name="blocked">, and Orcs and Trolls gain Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: River Lillies
cards.quote: Where the river runs clear, even shadow loosens its grip.
cards.actionEffect: All Hobbit characters in radius 2 shake off weariness: restore their action and movement, removing Blocked if present.

cards.name: Climbing the White Hills
cards.quote: From high stones, the world opens and the heart remembers hope.
cards.actionEffect: If played on hills or mountains, reveal the surrounding area in radius 2, and allied Hobbit and Elf units gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Travel through the Marsh
cards.quote: The mire keeps counsel with no one.
cards.actionEffect: The bogs swallow armies and hide the small. Enemies on swamp or shallow water in radius 2 gain Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> and Halted <sprite name="halted">; allied Hobbits there gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden">.

cards.name: Old Ruins of Arthedain
cards.quote: Broken kings still leave a brightness in the stones.
cards.actionEffect: Arthedain, Cardolan, and Rhudaur each reveal 2 hexes as seen for 1 turn.

cards.name: The Ford
cards.quote: A ford may be a road to one and a snare to another.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 2 that stand beside water are Halted <sprite name="halted"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Weathertop
cards.quote: On the watch hill, the stone itself seems to command stillness.
cards.actionEffect: The old watchtower commands all approaches — and traps those who hold it. All units here gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> and Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> but are Halted <sprite name="halted"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Floating in Barrels
cards.quote: When the river bears them onward, even a poor barrel may hide a quiet road.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Hobbit and Dwarf units on the sea in radius 5 move to the nearest land hex and gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Butterflies
cards.quote: A wing in the dusk may lend the land a moment's truth.
cards.actionEffect: Forest and swamp hexes in radius 3 are seen for 1 turn.

cards.name: Travel in Safety
cards.quote: A road safest of all is the one that brings folk home at last.
cards.actionEffect: Move all characters in this hex to your capital.

cards.name: Bounders
cards.quote: A quiet watch is the first wall of the Shire.

cards.name: Hobbit Archers
cards.quote: From the green hedges, a small bow may yet speak boldly.

cards.name: Hobbit Slingers
cards.quote: The road will remember the sting of stones.

cards.name: Dwarven Explorers
cards.quote: The deepest roads are found by the patient eye and the loyal lamp.

cards.name: Dragon Hunters
cards.quote: When the sky burns, only the grim-willed stand close enough to answer.

cards.name: Through Mirkwood Shadows
cards.quote: The dark boughs press close, but stout hearts still find the hidden deer-path.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal 5 unseen forest hexes for 1 turn.

cards.name: Troll's Hoard
cards.quote: Not all plunder belongs to the fools who piled it in the dark.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 1 random hidden artifact you do not already own.

cards.name: Elven Scouts
cards.quote: They read the path before the path is made, and vanish before the answer comes.

cards.name: Reclaimers Of Erebor
cards.quote: The Lonely Mountain remembers every oath spoken for its return.

cards.name: Mounted Rangers Of The North
cards.quote: The Rangers of the North ride as one at the edge of peril.

cards.name: Merry
cards.quote: Merry keeps his courage hidden until it is needed.
cards.actionEffect: Restore action <sprite name="action"> to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Frodo
cards.quote: Frodo bears a burden no hand can measure.
cards.actionEffect: Clear Despair <sprite name="despair"> from all controlled characters.

cards.name: Gildor Inglorion
cards.quote: Gildor Inglorion comes with the hush of the Eldar upon him.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal a hidden artifact <sprite name="artifact"> on a visible hex.

cards.name: Paladin
cards.quote: Paladin holds fast where lesser hearts would fail.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 15 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Gwaihir
cards.quote: Gwaihir sees the winds before they rise.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 4 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: Pippin
cards.quote: Pippin learns wisdom by hard roads and jest.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 2 Gold <sprite name="gold">.

cards.name: Wardens Of Annuminas
cards.quote: The wardens of Annuminas keep watch over a dead crown.

cards.name: Dunadan Rangers
cards.quote: The Dunedain keep the waste roads under secret watch.

cards.name: Arthedain
cards.quote: Arthedain remembers its kings in the wind.

cards.name: Cardolan
cards.quote: Cardolan keeps old roads under the grass.

cards.name: Rhudaur
cards.quote: Rhudaur keeps its watch in broken and haunted silence.

cards.name: TheShire
cards.quote: The Shire endures by patience and many watchful hands.

cards.name: Rivendell
cards.quote: Rivendell keeps its own light when the East is dim.

cards.name: TheNorthDowns
cards.quote: The North Downs stand as old sentinels over the road.

cards.name: AmonSul
cards.quote: Weathertop remembers moonlight, blade, and the long ache of old days.

cards.name: Annuminas
cards.quote: The stones of Annuminas wait in silence for the hand that shall wake them.

cards.name: Bree
cards.quote: Bree keeps faith with the road, though the years grow wary.

cards.name: Buckland
cards.quote: At Buckland the evening stillness is kept like a lamp in the window.

cards.name: Imladris
cards.quote: In Imladris grief is borne as song, and not as burden.

cards.name: Michel Delving
cards.quote: Michel Delving stands small to the eye, yet stout in the keeping of the Shire.

cards.name: Sarn Ford
cards.quote: At Sarn Ford the river keeps the western gate.

cards.name: ErynVorn
cards.quote: ErynVorn keeps the old forestÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s memory under its boughs, green and unbowed in the dusk.

cards.name: Bilbo
cards.quote: I think I am quite ready for another adventure.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal a hidden artifact <sprite name="artifact"> on a visible hex.

cards.name: Halbarad
cards.quote: With Aragorn, I will stand against the shadow.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 3 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: Sam
cards.quote: There's some good in this world, Mr. Frodo, and it's worth fighting for.
cards.actionEffect: Heal a random controlled character by 20.

cards.name: HarryGoatleaf
cards.quote: I’ll make sure the path is clear for the brave!
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the random enemy settlement for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Elladan
cards.quote: The shadows gather; we must ride swiftly.
cards.actionEffect: Restore full movement <sprite name="movement"> to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Elrohir
cards.quote: Our blades shall sing in defense of our kin.
cards.actionEffect: Heal a random controlled character by 15.

cards.name: Glorfindel
cards.quote: I have returned, and the shadows shall not claim this land while I stand.
cards.actionEffect: Encourage <sprite name="encouraged"> all controlled characters for 2 turn(s).

cards.name: Disturber of the Peace
cards.quote: Good morning. And what does a good morning mean to you? To me it means a great many things can still go unexpectedly right.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal a hidden artifact <sprite name="artifact"> on a visible hex.
